arts.ttl: De Roon Recovers from Injury, Set to Join Atalanta in Barcelona
arts.sum: Marten De Roon has made a swift recovery from his recent head injury and is ready to rejoin Atalanta for their crucial Champions League match against Barcelona. The Dutch midfielder, who was forced to leave the field during Saturday's game against Como due to a head trauma, has been cleared to play after participating in regular training with the team. The post De Roon Recovers from Injury, Set to Join Atalanta in Barcelona appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona News: 29 January 2025; All set for Atalanta clash, Andreas Christensen suffers new injury
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has already got the job done in the Champions League with a game to spare at home to Atalanta on Wednesday, but he knows that a top two finish is still an important goal. With both teams keen for the win, goals are almost guaranteed with the two of the top scoring sides in this season's Champions League coming face to face.
